description:
Product information:
Brand: Gu Jia
Function: Aromatherapy
Fragrance: a variety of flavors
Net content: 10ml sandalwood essential oil, 10ml lemongrass essential oil, 10ml rosemary essential oil, 10ml pine essential oil, 10ml grapefruit essential oil, 10ml tea tree essential oil, 10ml sweet orange essential oil, 10ml clove essential oil, 10 1ml Ylang Ylang essential oil, 10ml Frankincense essential oil, 10ml ginger essential oil, 10ml rose essential oil, 10ml vanilla essential oil, 10ml cinnamon essential oil, 10ml bergamot essential oil, 10ml lavender essential oil, 10ml peppermint essential oil, 10ml eucalyptus essential oil , 10ml geranium essential oil, 10ml lemon essential oil, 10ml chamomile essential oil, 10ml sage essential oil, 10ml patchouli essential oil, 10ml jasmine essential oil, 10ml basil essential oil, 10ml cardamom essential oil, 10ml green tea essential oil, 10ml carrot juice essential oil, 10ml cardamom essential oil, 6 essential oil set, 

Note: 

The scent of the 6-piece perfume is lavender mint sweet orange tea tree eucalyptus lemongrass
If you want to specify the fragrance, you need to order from 50PCS!!!!
